# Chapter 7: Ceramics  (~100 pp)
- 7.1 Ceramic structure and bonding (10) · 7.2 Mechanical behaviour: brittleness, Weibull statistics (15) · 7.3 Glasses (12) · 7.4 Refractories and high-temperature applications (12) · 7.5 Concrete: the most-used engineered material (20) · 7.6 Electronic ceramics: piezoelectrics, ferroelectrics (12) · 7.7 Failure section: brittle fracture, thermal shock, concrete spalling (19)

**Archetype**: failure (brittleness), scaling. **Project**: measure the strength distribution of a brittle material (chalk, mortar) using Weibull analysis. **Exercises**: 25.
